mechanism_summary: Plain havoc BytesDeleteMutator shrinks input below 128-byte header minimum so Read returns a count != 1; ctx/I2S techniques keep inputs large and valid, anchoring to the well-formed path.
one_line: havoc shrinks input below 128-byte header; ctx/I2S anchor large valid seeds

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutes OpenType table FOURCC tags from comparison logs, locking inputs to sfnt header structure and away from the free leading-byte variation needed to land an RTL script tag; havoc freely explores the script byte space.
one_line: I2S pins loser to sfnt table tags; havoc freely explores script bytes for RTL case

mechanism_summary: I2S substitutes table FOURCC tags (GSUB, GPOS, MATH) from comparison logs, locking loser inputs to valid well-formed fonts that never reach the RUNIC/unrecognized fall-through; havoc produces degenerate tags that reach the fallback arm.
one_line: I2S locks loser to valid FOURCC tags; havoc produces degenerate inputs for RUNIC fall-through

mechanism_summary: No CMP operand gates the stage-pause check; I2S overhead and operand-driven substitution divert loser into expensive GPOS sanitize subtable paths that winners never enter, blocking the stage loop traversal branch.
one_line: I2S overhead diverts loser into deep GPOS sanitize paths, blocking stage-pause check

mechanism_summary: The branch is a range/mask test on a derived Unicode codepoint with no direct CMP operand; I2S finds nothing useful to substitute, so its overhead dilutes havoc budget that would otherwise land 0x0E-block bytes.
one_line: I2S gains no traction on mask-derived codepoint; havoc freely places 0x0E Thai bytes

mechanism_summary: CCC132 is computed from font tables, not a raw input comparison; I2S operand substitution is counterproductive, spending budget on irrelevant byte-level CMP matches while blocking the table-derived combining-class switch arm.
one_line: I2S counterproductive on font-table-derived CCC132; havoc mutation reaches combining-class arm

mechanism_summary: The false branch needs successful Unicode composition, not a CMP-solved literal; I2S over-fits the loser onto switch equality arms for Hebrew mark literals (e.g. 0x05B7), trapping it in the true-branch fallback path. Havoc's broad structural exploration occasionally yields a composable base+mark pair.
one_line: I2S traps loser in Hebrew mark equality arms; havoc structural exploration reaches false branch

mechanism_summary: Adding I2S to value_profile is a regression: the codepoint literal arises from plain havoc/token byte mutation; the I2SRandReplace stage diverts mutation energy away from simply hitting the literal codepoint bytes and the loser never takes the true branch.
one_line: I2S diverts energy from literal codepoint bytes; havoc randomly lands 0x0E0E/0F pair

mechanism_summary: Thai state-machine produces the SL enum via table lookups, not a direct CMP; I2S operand substitution finds no useful operand and pollutes the corpus, blocking the SL arm; havoc byte mutation accumulates Thai mark/consonant codepoints reaching SL.
one_line: I2S finds no operand for table-derived SL enum; havoc accumulates Thai mark codepoints

mechanism_summary: USE halant category is assigned by harfbuzz machine-class tables from glyph properties; I2S substitutes integers from comparison sites unrelated to the shaper-derived category, diverting budget and blocking the true branch.
one_line: I2S substitutes irrelevant CMP integers; havoc produces glyph inputs reaching USE halant category

mechanism_summary: I2S finds no exploitable CMP operand because the gate is two conjoined range checks; naive havoc mutation independently reaches both jamo ranges without operand substitution, while I2S adds per-execution overhead with zero substitution benefit.
one_line: conjoint range gate defeated by havoc; I2S finds no operand to substitute

mechanism_summary: Gate checks a pointer state (non-null predecessor in linked list) built by broad address-management exploration; I2S diverts mutation budget to CMP operand substitution that does nothing for a pointer/state predicate, slowing the havoc-based state building that populates the list.
one_line: null-pointer state gate; I2S wastes budget on inapplicable CMP substitution

mechanism_summary: I2S operand-substitution homogenizes the corpus toward matching CMP operands, collapsing input diversity and preventing the multi-entry list construction needed for the false (non-matching) loop branch; plain havoc preserves diversity.
one_line: I2S homogenizes corpus, preventing diverse list needed for false loop branch
